case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS KING, AMUNRE A.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $749.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT KING, AMUNRE A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-17-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
